script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== before: /home/azureuser perms ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser 2>&1
echo '=== chmod 0711 /home/azureuser (world-traversable, no listing) ==='
chmod 0711 /home/azureuser
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser 2>&1
echo '=== verify aixa can execute claude binary now ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo "What is two plus two?" | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --dangerously-skip-permissions > /tmp/aixa_v2 2>/tmp/aixa_v2_err; echo "rc=$?"; echo "--stdout--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_v2; echo; echo "--stderr--"; head -c 500 /tmp/aixa_v2_err'
echo '=== verify mskai (azureuser) still works ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --dangerously-skip-permissions 2>&1' | head -3
echo '===END==='
